creator: demon@FreeBSD.org
text:
I want to keep 1.8 in -devel port for some more time, because 1.8 branch has a lot of drastic changes and 1.7 is very stable.

I'd prefer to stick to upstream as much as possible (do not make local changes unless really necessary).  So I'd grab that patch as is, and if it is really needed to adjust it for clang that push these changes upstream (clang is used not only on FreeBSD, so others will also benefit).

Thanks.
